## Meeting Purpose

[Check-in on Lovable templates, guides, and tool development.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Lovable Upsell Approved:** The client accepted the $40k upsell for 10 templates/week and 10 guides/week.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [**Contractor Search Strategy:** The search for a new template contractor will prioritize candidates who can scale to 10–15 templates/week to support future upsells.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [**New Airtable Workflow:** A new Airtable base now centralizes template tracking and assignments, streamlining the production process.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [**Tool Automation Progress:** Nico is finalizing the "Lovable Tool Brief" automation, which will generate tech specs for new tools from simple inputs.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

## Topics

### Lovable Upsell & Production Plan

  - [The client accepted the $40k upsell, which includes:](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
      - [**Templates:** 10/week (up from 5)](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [**Guides:** 10/week (down from 15 post-sprint)](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [**Rationale for Price:** The $40k price was approved because production volume is not a 1:1 cost driver. The previous 5→15 guide upsell was only $10k because removing manual review layers kept headcount flat, making the cost increase marginal.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [**Guide Production:** Jenny will now produce 3 guides/day on Mon/Tues. Nico will use these as test data for the publishing automation.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)

### Template Contractor Search

  - [**Goal:** Find a new contractor to increase template production from 5 to 10/week.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** The search now prioritizes candidates who can scale to 10–15 templates/week.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This supports future upsells and simplifies management by consolidating work under one contractor.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [**Contingency Plan:** If no suitable candidate is found by EOW, Georgemaine will create a 15-template batch to provide a 3-week buffer.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [**Candidate Pipeline:** Marilia has shared the project with 3 new candidates, with submissions expected by Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)

### New Airtable Workflow

  - [Megan created a new Airtable base to centralize template tracking and assignments.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [**Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [**`Assignments` Tab:** Manages the production pipeline (Not Started → Ready to Publish → Published).](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [**`Keywords` Tab:** Organizes keywords by category with metrics (e.g., search volume).](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [Assign a keyword from the `Keywords` tab to the `Assignments` tab.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
      - [Track progress by adding links for the Lovable preview, Atlas workflow, and live page.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**Next Focus:** "Wedding websites" category, chosen for its simplicity compared to "startup landing pages."](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)

### Tool Automation Development

  - [Nico is finalizing the "Lovable Tool Brief" automation.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [**Functionality:** Generates a detailed tech spec for a new tool from simple inputs.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Progress:**](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
      - [Prompt-building and Lovable Cloud enablement workflows are complete.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
      - [Fixing a conflict with Lovable's new prompt box UI.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [**Status:** Full pipeline in Atlas expected by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**George:** Finalize the $40k upsell with Sam on the 1/20 call.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [**George:** Review Georgemaine's template page design and introduce Georgemaine to Sebastian.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [**Georgemaine:** Brief Marilia on the new contractor requirement (scalable to 10–15 templates/week).](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [**Georgemaine:** Begin work on the "wedding websites" template category.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [**Nico:** Finalize the "Lovable Tool Brief" automation by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [**Nico:** Test the template automation with the new templates and provide a staging link for review.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [**Nico:** Test the guide publishing automation using Jenny's new guides.](https://fathom.video/share/oWctHZozhspTVwziBj3GdMbjUBND1v2r?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
